caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt featuring the text "ION NEVER DO SV7" sits in a room decorated with framed photos and clothing racks. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. To his left, a red plastic cup sits on a surface. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt with a black graphic. The room contains various pieces of apparel on hangers and multiple framed images on the walls. On-screen logos appear in the corners, including one that reads "DOSS SV7". Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand, which is initially visible and then moves out of frame. He maintains a consistent position while his facial expression shifts slightly, transitioning from a serious look to a subtle smile.
